title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 18–21, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The crew follows Nami’s trail toward the island ruled by Arlong and begins to learn how dangerous her home is.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong doesn't have the time to waste,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Use it for your own protection.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Ohhh! So you're back, that was quite a long trip...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This mansion is as lax as always...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ha... as if anyone would knowingly dare to raid my estate...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How much did you rake in this time?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...but it was strangely quite heart- breaking this time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Since when did you get so sentimental!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Betraying people is your specialty, isn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: My fishman Brothers, our Comrade has returned! Let us prepare a feast!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Are you sure Nami's really in there?

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
